title: Bulk editable email sending
excerpt: Hi there, it would be great to be able to select multiple contacts at once from a board and send them all an email template that can be edited before it is sent out

posts.author: cj2112 (Charles Joh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, it would be great to be able to select multiple contacts at once from a board and send them all an email template that can be edited before it is sent out
